question.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM trajectory.tracking;
SELECT m.title FROM imdb.movies m ORDER BY m.year ASC LIMIT 1;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT movieid, COUNT(directorid) FROM imdb.movies2directors GROUP BY movieid HAVING COUNT(directorid) > 7 ) AS movie_count;
SELECT year FROM imdb.movies WHERE movieid = ( SELECT movieid FROM imdb.movies2directors GROUP BY movieid ORDER BY COUNT(directorid) DESC, movieid LIMIT 1);

SELECT ac.actorid FROM imdb.actors ac JOIN imdb.movies2actors m2a ON ac.actorid = m2a.actorid WHERE m2a.movieid IN ( SELECT m2a.movieid FROM imdb.actors ac INNER JOIN imdb.movies2actors m2a ON ac.actorid = m2a.actorid WHERE ac.name = 'Hanks, Tom') AND ac.name <> 'Hanks, Tom' GROUP BY ac.actorid ORDER BY COUNT(ac.actorid) DESC LIMIT 1;
SELECT (mv.year / 10) * 10 AS decade FROM imdb.movies mv JOIN imdb.ratings rt ON mv.movieid = rt.movieid GROUP BY (mv.year / 10) * 10 ORDER BY AVG(rt.rank::float) DESC LIMIT 1;
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT movieid) FROM (SELECT mv.movieid FROM imdb.movies mv JOIN imdb.movies2directors md ON mv.movieid = md.movieid WHERE genre IS NULL) AS no_genre_movies;

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT dr.movieid) FROM imdb.movies2directors dr JOIN imdb.movies2writers wr ON dr.movieid = wr.movieid AND dr.directorid = wr.writerid JOIN imdb.actors a ON a.actorid = dr.directorid WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT * FROM imdb.movies2actors ac WHERE ac.movieid = dr.movieid AND ac.actorid = dr.directorid );
SELECT d.directorid FROM imdb.runningtimes r JOIN imdb.movies2directors d ON d.movieid = r.movieid WHERE time1 > 160 GROUP BY d.directorid ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT d.movieid) DESC LIMIT 1;

SELECT ma.actorid FROM imdb.movies2actors ma JOIN imdb.movies m ON m.movieid = ma.movieid WHERE m.year < 2015 GROUP BY ma.actorid HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT ma.movieid) > 43 AND EXISTS (SELECT * FROM imdb.movies2directors md JOIN imdb.directors d ON md.directorid = d.directorid JOIN imdb.movies2actors m2a ON md.movieid = m2a.movieid WHERE d.name = 'Spielberg, Steven' AND m2a.actorid = ma.actorid);
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM scenicornot.locations WHERE ST_DWithin(geom_bng, ST_SetSRID(ST_MakePoint(326623,523330),27700), 5000);
SELECT h.cell_id FROM scenicornot.hexgrid10km h JOIN scenicornot.locations l ON ST_INTERSECTS(h.geom, l.geom_bng) GROUP BY h.cell_id HAVING COUNT(l.*) >= 3 ORDER BY AVG(l.average) DESC LIMIT 1;

SELECT MAX(total_votes) FROM ( SELECT SUM(array_length(string_to_array(l.votes, ','),1)) AS total_votes FROM scenicornot.hexgrid10km h JOIN scenicornot.locations l ON ST_INTERSECTS(h.geom, l.geom_bng) GROUP BY h.cell_id ) AS max_votes;

WITH hex_scores AS ( SELECT h.cell_id, h.geom, AVG(l.average) AS avg_score FROM scenicornot.hexgrid10km h JOIN scenicornot.locations l ON ST_Intersects(l.geom_bng, h.geom) GROUP BY h.cell_id, h.geom ) SELECT CONCAT(a.cell_id,',', b.cell_id) FROM hex_scores a JOIN hex_scores b ON ST_Touches(a.geom, b.geom) WHERE a.cell_id < b.cell_id ORDER BY ABS(a.avg_score - b.avg_score) DESC LIMIT 1;
SELECT DATE_BIN('48 hours', datetime, TIMESTAMP '2011-05-01 00:00:00') FROM quakes.scotquakes GROUP BY DATE_BIN('48 hours', datetime, TIMESTAMP '2011-05-01 00:00:00') ORDER by COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1;
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT clusterid) FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT ST_ClusterDBSCAN(geom, 15000, 4) OVER () AS clusterid FROM quakes.scotquakes q) WHERE clusterid IS NOT NULL;
SELECT userid FROM trajectory.tracking GROUP BY userid ORDER BY COUNT(userid) DESC LIMIT 1;

WITH user_routes AS ( SELECT userid, ST_MAKELINE(geom ORDER BY datetime) AS route_geom FROM trajectory.tracking GROUP BY userid ) SELECT userid FROM user_routes ORDER BY ST_LENGTH(route_geom) / ST_DISTANCE(ST_STARTPOINT(route_geom), ST_ENDPOINT(route_geom)) DESC LIMIT 1;
SELECT EXTRACT(MONTH FROM date_taken) AS month_ FROM flickr.flickr_edin GROUP BY month_ ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1;
SELECT userid FROM flickr.flickr_edin GROUP BY userid ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT (FLOOR(ST_X(geom)/100), FLOOR(ST_Y(geom)/100))) DESC LIMIT 1;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT osm_name FROM accident.network WHERE osm_name ILIKE '%avenue%' GROUP BY osm_name HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT osm_id) > 1) AS avenues;

WITH route_stats AS ( SELECT 'a' AS route_id, COUNT(c.id) AS crash_count, (ST_Length(r.geom) / 1000.0) AS length_km FROM accident.route_a r LEFT JOIN accident.edincrash c ON ST_DWithin(c.geom, r.geom, 15) GROUP BY r.geom UNION ALL SELECT 'b', COUNT(c.id), (ST_Length(r.geom) / 1000.0) FROM accident.route_b r LEFT JOIN accident.edincrash c ON ST_DWithin(c.geom, r.geom, 15) GROUP BY r.geom UNION ALL SELECT 'c', COUNT(c.id), (ST_Length(r.geom) / 1000.0) FROM accident.route_c r LEFT JOIN accident.edincrash c ON ST_DWithin(c.geom, r.geom, 15) GROUP BY r.geom ) SELECT route_id FROM route_stats ORDER BY crash_count / NULLIF(length_km, 0) DESC LIMIT 1;
